options.name: -arc
options.description: The arc(s) for which the report is to be printed.

options.name: -constrained_pin_transition
options.description: Specifies the constrained_pin slew (valid for constraint arcs) at which the parameters need to be reported. The slew is to be given in the units specified by 'get_time_unit'.

options.name: -delay
options.description: Specifies if delay is to be reported.

options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies if early LVF data is to be reported. This option can only be used in conjuction with '-lvf' option.

options.name: -fall
options.description: Specifies if details of fall tables are to be reported.

options.name: -input_net_transition
options.description: Specifies the slew at which the parameters need to be reported. The slew is to be given in the units specified by 'get_time_unit'.

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies if late LVF data is to be reported. This option can only be used in conjuction with '-lvf' option.

options.name: -lvf
options.description: Specifies if LVF data is to be reported.

options.name: -mean_shift
options.description: Specifies if mean_shift data is to be reported. This option can only be used in conjuction with '-moments' option.

options.name: -moments
options.description: Specifies if moments data is to be reported.

options.name: -nldm
options.description: Specifies if NLDM data is to be reported.

options.name: -related_pin_transition
options.description: Specifies the related_pin slew (valid for constraint arcs) at which the parameters need to be reported. The slew is to be given in the units specified by 'get_time_unit'.

options.name: -rise
options.description: Specifies if details of rise tables are to be reported.

options.name: -skewness
options.description: Specifies if skewness data is to be reported. This option can only be used in conjuction with '-moments' option.

options.name: -std_dev
options.description: Specifies if std_dev data is to be reported. This option can only be used in conjuction with '-moments' option.

options.name: -total_output_net_capacitance
options.description: Specifies the load at which the parameters need to be reported. The load is to be given in the units specified by 'get_capacitance_unit'.

options.name: -transition
options.description: Specifies if output slew is to be reported.
